'''warozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zaildar|zaildar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-r-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zaildar|zaildar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| warozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wærezheth|wærezheth]] || [[word:wærezhej|wærezhej]] || [[word:wærezhesh|wærezhesh]] || [[word:wærezhe|wærezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:warorozhoth|warorozhoth]] || [[word:warorozhoj|warorozhoj]] || [[word:warorozhosh|warorozhosh]] || [[word:warorozho|warorozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:warozhoth|warozhoth]] || [[word:warozhoj|warozhoj]] || [[word:warozhosh|warozhosh]] || [[word:warozho|warozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:warofzhoth|warofzhoth]] || [[word:warofzhoj|warofzhoj]] || [[word:warofzhosh|warofzhosh]] || [[word:warofzhof|warofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:warozhotho|warozhotho]] || [[word:warozhojo|warozhojo]] || [[word:warozhosho|warozhosho]] || [[word:warozhoko|warozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:warozhoth|warozhoth]] || [[word:warozhoj|warozhoj]] || [[word:warozhosh|warozhosh]] || [[word:warozho|warozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:warozhothol|warozhothol]] || [[word:warozhojol|warozhojol]] || [[word:warozhoshol|warozhoshol]] || [[word:warozhokol|warozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:warozhothotho|warozhothotho]] || [[word:warozhojojo|warozhojojo]] || [[word:warozhoshosho|warozhoshosho]] || [[word:warozhoko|warozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:warozhothon|warozhothon]] || [[word:warozhojon|warozhojon]] || [[word:warozhoshon|warozhoshon]] || [[word:warozhokon|warozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:warozhothoro|warozhothoro]] || [[word:warozhojoro|warozhojoro]] || [[word:warozhoshoro|warozhoshoro]] || [[word:warozhokoro|warozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
